📘 Administrator

EDMS Admin Manual

Manage documents, users, approvals, and system configuration — everything administrators need.

📅 Updated: June 16, 2026
🏷️ v1.0
📄 17 sections
⏱ 15 min read
📸 Screenshots included
📋
Section 1

Introduction

Welcome to EDMS. This manual is for users who can upload documents and/or approve them.

PermissionWhat It Unlocks
documents.viewDashboard, All Documents, Recently Viewed, Workflow Templates (read-only)
documents.uploadMy Documents, Drafts, Upload wizard
documents.approvePending Approvals — only visible when your role includes this permission
⚠️ If a menu item is missing, your role may not include the required permission — contact your administrator.
🔐
Section 2

Logging In

Login screen

  1. Enter your Username (email, e.g. you@vivant.com).
  2. Enter your Password. Eye icon shows/hides it.
  3. Press Enter or click Sign In.
⚠️ Red error message appears if credentials are incorrect.

Google Sign-In

Click Continue with Google, select account, redirected to Dashboard.

Logging Out

Click avatar top-right > Logout.

🖥️
Section 3

Interface Overview

AreaDescription
SidebarNavigation menu — shows only what your role can access. Hamburger (≡) collapses/expands.
Header"Search documents, files, content..." bar. Moon icon for dark/light mode. Notification bell. Profile avatar.
Main ContentDocuments, tables, dashboards, and forms.
📊
Section 4

Dashboard

4.1 Stat Cards

Approved Documents + Documents Viewed.

4.2 Projects Grid

Colored folder cards with project name, doc count, pending count (orange). Click to filter.

4.3 Recent Documents

Last 8 updated docs. Columns: DOCUMENT, OWNER, TYPE, VERSION, STATUS, MODIFIED.

4.4 My Activity

"My Activity — Your recent document actions." Activity badges, description, timestamp.

📁
Section 5

All Documents

All Documents screen

5.1 Layout & Toolbar

  • Left sidebarProject folder tree. Reload (↺) refreshes.
  • Right toolbarAll Types filter, Sort, List/Grid toggle, + New Upload button (upload permission only).

5.2 Document List

Each row: file type icon, title (bold) + code + colored project tag. Columns: DOCUMENT, OWNER, MODIFIED, VERSION, STATUS, TYPE, ACTIONS. Eye icon opens document.

5.3 Status Tabs

All, Approved, Pending, Resubmit, Rejected.

📄
Section 6

Document Detail

Click the eye icon on any document to open Document Detail.

6.1 Overview Tab

Overview tab

Fields: Project, Code, Version, Discipline, Created, Type, Last Modified, Created By, Status. Also: Description, AI Overview, Approval Pipeline (when Pending), VIEWED BY.

6.2 Files Tab

Files tab — locked

Files tab — editable

AI Summary expanded

✦ AI Summary toggle (^ when expanded), View, Download (if allowed), Remove (when editable). Files lock when Approved/Rejected/Archived or once approval steps begun. Cannot remove last file.

6.3 PDF Viewer

PDF Viewer

  • LeftPDF + page badge + collapse arrow (>)
  • HeaderTitle/code, viewer count, fullscreen (⤢), search
  • CommentsGeneral Comments + Highlights tabs. Write comments or highlight PDF text.

6.4 Version History

Version History

Cards: version badge, change summary (blue), date, uploaded by. Current has green "Current" badge.

6.5 Status History

Status History

Cards newest-first: colored left bar, title, "Changed to [Status]", "By [Name or System] · [DateTime]". Current has green badge.

6.6 Retention

Retention tab

  • Assigned PolicyName + period
  • Effective FromWhen retention started
  • Retention End Date"Document expires on this date"
  • Secure DeleteYes/No
  • Approval RequiredYes/No

Resubmit Button

If status is Resubmit, a blue Resubmit button appears in the footer. Click to optionally update SLA date and resubmit. Workflow restarts from Step 1.

📂
Section 7

My Documents

Route: Documents > My Documents. Requires documents.upload. Your created documents excluding Drafts and Rejected.

  • View (eye icon)Opens Document Detail
  • Resubmit (refresh icon)Opens Resubmit dialog when status is Resubmit
📝
Section 8

Drafts

Route: Documents > Drafts. Requires documents.upload. Saved but unsubmitted documents.

  • View (eye icon)Opens Document Detail
  • Submit for Approval iconOpens the Submit for Approval dialog
🕐
Section 9

Recently Viewed

Recently Viewed screen

Columns: DOCUMENT TITLE, DISCIPLINE, TYPE, VERSION, LAST VIEWED (date + time). End of list: "All N viewed documents loaded".

⬆️
Section 10

Uploading Documents

Access via + New Upload on All Documents. Title: "Upload Document". 3 steps.

10.1 Step 1 — Upload & Classify

Step 1 — empty drop zone

Step 1 — card expanded

"Select source..." dropdown (Local Device or OneDrive). PDF and DWG only. Drop zone: "Drag PDF or DWG files here / or click to browse and select files".

FieldDetails
DOCUMENT TITLE *"e.g. VNT-ENG-2024-..." — 0/60
DOC TYPE *Select from list
DISCIPLINE *Your department
PROJECT *"Select folder..." — opens folder picker
RETENTION *Select policy
DESCRIPTIONOptional — 0/250
Shareable"Allow external share links" — OFF
Downloadable"Allow internal downloads" — ON

Select a Folder dialog

Multiple documents — bulk hint bar

Bulk hint: "Tick cards to apply shared metadata in bulk". Validation: "Missing: Title, Doc Type, Discipline, Project, Retention". + Add Another Document adds more. Navigation: Cancel and "Continue →".

10.2 Step 2 — Review & Route

Step 2 — Save as Draft

Step 2 — Submit for Approval

Per card: Save as Draft (no workflow) or Submit for Approval (expands ROUTING DETAILS: Workflow Template + SLA Date). Navigation: "← Back" and "Upload & Process →".

10.3 Step 3 — Processing & Confirm

Step 3 — success

Step 3 — expanded summary

Green banner: "[N] document(s) uploaded successfully!" Expand card for full summary + AI processing banner. Toast: "[name] uploaded" + "View Details". Buttons: "Upload Another" and "View All Documents".

✅
Section 11

Submit for Approval

Opens from Submit for Approval icon on a Draft. During upload, routing is inline in Step 2 — this dialog is only for previously saved Drafts.

  • Document CardTitle, code, version at top
  • Workflow Template *Required. "View steps / Hide steps" shows Approval Pipeline Preview.
  • SLA Date *"Select a date (min 3 days from today)..." — min 3, max 30 days
  • Info banner"All approvers will be notified..."
  • Button"Submit for Approval" — disabled until both fields filled
⚠️ If no active templates exist: "No active workflow templates found." Contact your administrator.
⏳
Section 12

Pending Approvals

Route: Workflows > Approvals > Pending Approvals. Requires documents.approve. Only visible when your role includes this permission.

Pending Approvals table

12.1 Approvals Table

Columns: CODE, DOCUMENT, WORKFLOW, APPROVAL PIPELINE (current = dark pill, remaining = grey chips), SLA (orange when warning), ACTIONS. Filter: "All ▼" dropdown.

12.2 Approval Dialog

Approval Dialog

Left panel: code + status, meta grid (DOCUMENT TYPE, DISCIPLINE, SUBMITTED BY, VERSION, LAST MODIFIED, SLA DEADLINE), Description, AI Summary (teal), Approval Pipeline (vertical steps with Done/Pending/Waiting badges).

Right panel: REVIEWING AS card, SLA DEADLINE ("Xd left" + progress bar), REVIEW COMMENTS (max 100 chars, required for Return for Revision and Reject).

YOUR DECISION: Approve (green) · Return for Revision (outlined) · Reject (red outlined).

⚠️ 60-second undo snackbar after submitting. Click Undo to reverse.
⚙️
Section 13

Workflow Templates

Workflow Templates — read-only view

Cards: type icon, name + Sequential/Parallel badge, description, "N Stages" badge, step chips ("1 Role > 2 Role"). Read-only unless you have documents.manage permission.

🔔
Section 14

Notifications

Notifications panel

  • ✓✓Mark all as read
  • ✕Dismiss individual
  • Red dotUnread indicator

Types: Document Approved · Document Created · Share Link Approval Required. Click to navigate.

👤
Section 15

Your Profile

User Profile dialog

Click avatar top-right > User Profile. Shows avatar, name, email, role badge, Active status, DISCIPLINE, LAST LOGIN, ROLES & PERMISSIONS (chips + checklist).

Moon icon toggles dark/light mode. Logout ends session.

🔧
Section 16

Troubleshooting

IssueWhat to Do
Cannot log inCheck username/password. Caps Lock off. Contact administrator.
Google sign-in errorAccount may not be linked or deactivated. Contact administrator.
Menu item missingFeature requires a permission your role may not have. Contact administrator.
File rejected on uploadOnly PDF and DWG accepted.
No templates in Submit for ApprovalNo active templates. Contact administrator.
Document stuck on PendingCheck Approval Pipeline in Overview tab.
Accidentally approved/rejectedClick Undo in the 60-second snackbar if still visible.
Cannot add/remove fileFiles lock when Approved/Rejected/Archived or once approval steps begun.
Cannot remove last fileAdd a new file first, then remove the old one.
Pending Approvals not in sidebarRequires Approve Documents permission.
My Documents/Drafts missingRequires Upload Documents permission.
📖
Section 17

Glossary

TermMeaning
Document CodeUnique auto-generated code per document.
DraftSaved but not yet submitted for approval.
DWGAutoCAD drawing file format.
Parallel WorkflowAll approvers notified simultaneously.
PendingAwaiting an approval decision.
Return for RevisionSends document back to submitter with comments.
ResubmitReturned/rejected document corrected and resubmitted.
Retention PolicyHow long a document must be kept.
Sequential WorkflowApprovers act one at a time.
SLAService Level Agreement — deadline for approval.
StagesNumber of approval steps in a workflow template.
VersionA numbered revision of a document's files.
📋
Changelog

Changelog

v1.0 June 16, 2026 Initial Release

First version of the manual. Covers all screens verified against the live application with embedded screenshots.

Features included in this release:

  • ✅ Complete screen-by-screen documentation
  • ✅ Embedded verified screenshots
  • ✅ Role-specific content (Viewer / Admin)
  • ✅ Live search and sidebar navigation
  • ✅ PDF download
  • ✅ Previous / Next section navigation
  • ✅ "Was this helpful?" feedback
  • ✅ Multi-language support (English, Filipino, Bisaya)
  • ✅ Reading progress tracker
